methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $114M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 22.3x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Speedata is a Series B chip design company founded by Jonathan Friedmann and Rami Dahan. The valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of 6 private peers in the Chips & Semiconductors sector at same or adjacent stages (Etched, d-Matrix, Positron AI, Substrate, DEEPX), plus 3 public semiconductor benchmarks (ALAB, NVDA, AMD), with an additional 5 private reference companies including Cerebras and SambaNova Systems.

Two valuation methods apply to Speedata. Stage-progression analysis uses the $114M in total capital raised as a proxy and applies a typical 1.9x step-up multiplier to the Series B stage, implying $217M. Peer-median analysis across 6 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage companies yields a median valuation of $1.0B, with a range of $500M to $5.0B. Public comp anchoring cannot be applied—while the Semiconductors sector P/S median is 22.3x across the three public tickers, Speedata's revenue is not disclosed, precluding a revenue-based multiple application.

The triangulated range is $184M to $1.1B, with a median of $608M across the two applicable methods. The wide spread reflects the inherent dispersion in peer valuations ($500M–$5.0B) and the early-stage nature of chip design ventures. Key uncertainties include Speedata's actual revenue run-rate, product commercialization timeline, and market position relative to the named peers, all of which would tighten this range substantially.
